creator: odmin@mentat.ru
text:
/usr/local/ICAClient/wfcmgr 
starts correctly

When I attempt to run: "/usr/local/ICAClient/wfica" I get the following error:

Warning: Missing charsets in String to FontSet conversion
Warning: Unable to load any usable ISO8859 font
Warning: Missing charsets in String to FontSet conversion
Error: Aborting: no font found

How-To-Repeat: install citrix_ica from ports
/usr/ports/net/citrix_ica

then run 
/usr/local/ICAClient/wfcmgr 
and configure connection to Citrix Server

then run 
/usr/local/ICAClient/wfica
